name_en: (With full packaging)!!️ Gucci logo long card holder. The men's daily accessories collection is reimagined with classic black leather. The 2024 Early Spring collection reinterprets classic accessories with the Gucci lettering, cleverly showcasing the brand's identity. This long card holder features eight card slots and two bill compartments. Black leather, cloud print fabric lining, Gucci logo. Interior: eight card slots and two bill compartments.
name_cn:
(With full packaging)!!️ Gucci logo long card holder. The men's daily accessories collection is reimagined with classic black leather. The 2024 Early Spring collection reinterprets classic accessories with the Gucci lettering, cleverly showcasing the brand's identity. This long card holder features eight card slots and two bill compartments. Black leather, cloud print fabric lining, Gucci logo. Interior: eight card slots and two bill compartments.
Model: 771159.
Open dimensions: 12cm (L) x 15cm (W)
Closed dimensions: 12cm (L) x 7.5cm (W)
Color: Black/Original leather.
